title: Blue Water Solutions Knysna voted best water & filtration business
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are humbled, but so proud...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are humbled, but so proud to be named the Best Water & Filtration Business in Knysna.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are humbled, but so proud to be named the Best Water & Filtration Business in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Blue Water Solutions Knysna is owned by Louis Nel, who has been at the helm of the Knysna branch since June 2015, serving the community with dedication and expertise.","html":"Blue Water Solutions Knysna is owned by Louis Nel, who has been at the helm of the Knysna branch since June 2015, serving the community with dedication and expertise."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Blue Water Solutions has an established footprint in the Garden Route, spanning from Mossel Bay and George to Knysna, with its “Love your Water” concept stores having expanded to Oudtshoorn as well."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Blue Water Solutions, our mission is simple: to deliver high-quality water purification products and solutions that are both cost-effective and environmentally friendly. Whether you need a system for  our home, business, or specialised application, we are dedicated to ensuring that you receive clean, safe, and reliable water, no matter the source.","html":"At Blue Water Solutions, our mission is simple: to deliver high-quality water purification products and solutions that are both cost-effective and environmentally friendly. Whether you need a system for our home, business, or specialised application, we are dedicated to ensuring that you receive clean, safe, and reliable water, no matter the source."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each of our retail stores in Mossel Bay, George and Knysna also offers a convenient water refill service. All you have to do is bring your own water container, and our friendly staff will refill your  container with well-balanced mineral water.","html":"Each of our retail stores in Mossel Bay, George and Knysna also offers a convenient water refill service. All you have to do is bring your own water container, and our friendly staff will refill your container with well-balanced mineral water."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only R1.00 per litreThe hygiene of both staff and venue is crucial for us to ensure you receive 100% purified water in the most sterile environment. We also offer a sanitising service and will sanitise your water bottle on request (minimal fee may apply based on condition of bottle).","html":"Only R1.00 per litre
The hygiene of both staff and venue is crucial for us to ensure you receive 100% purified water in the most sterile environment. We also offer a sanitising service and will sanitise your water bottle on request (minimal fee may apply based on condition of bottle)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Loyalty programmeDon’t forget to ask about our in-store loyalty programme, which has been very popular with our regulars for years!","html":"Loyalty programme
Don’t forget to ask about our in-store loyalty programme, which has been very popular with our regulars for years!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We look forward to serve you up the best-tasting alkaline mineral water the Garden Route has to offer!","html":"We look forward to serve you up the best-tasting alkaline mineral water the Garden Route has to offer!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A heartfelt thank youThis award would not have been possible without the dedication of our Knysna team, whose hard work and customer care make all the difference. And to our loyal customers – thank you for trusting us with your most essential resource. Your continued support is what makes Blue Water Solutions Knysna the best.","html":"A heartfelt thank you
This award would not have been possible without the dedication of our Knysna team, whose hard work and customer care make all the difference. And to our loyal customers – thank you for trusting us with your most essential resource. Your continued support is what makes Blue Water Solutions Knysna the best."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact us:","html":"Contact us:"},{"type":"list","items":["044 382 2983","www.bluewatersolutions.co.za","Woodmill Lane, Shopping Centre, Main rd, Knysna | Waterfront Park, New Street, Knysna"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
